name: micro-gate-slop
prediction: shortcut patterns in just-edited files (error swallowing, type escapes, suppression comments, lazy asserts) draw one steer at turn end: shortcut-tainted final patches drop, pass rate on hidden-grader tasks rises or holds, no added turns on clean sessions (loopgate anti-slop port, 2026-07-20). micro-gate.slop-fired telemetry confirms firing; measured ALONE (MICRO_GATE stays off) so the leaf is causal.
